text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
It looks like you had a conversation with
one of the support Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Every single encounter is a precious
experience. Be sure to make use of them
while training!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Incidentally, the academy is a big place,
so you also have a chance of meeting
individuals who weren't included in your
Support Card deck.
